skills.name: Test automation & frameworks
skills.detail: C#.NET, TypeScript, Java, Selenium, Appium, Playwright, SpecFlow, Reqnroll, RestSharp, Visual Studio, AI-assisted scripting

skills.name: Manual testing & strategy
skills.detail: Functional System Testing, Exploratory Testing, Risk-based Testing, Test case management, User acceptance testing (UAT) facilitation, AI-assited test design and execution

skills.name: Multi-platform system testing
skills.detail: Web UIs, Mobile (iOS/Android), Desktop applications, Oracle Flexcube, Salesforce CRM, SAP IS-U, eCommerce

skills.name: Integration & data validation
skills.detail: API / Web services testing, MS SQL database, Oracle database, Dapper, Charles Proxy

skills.name: Defect lifecycle & triage leadership
skills.detail: Root cause analysis, cross-team defect triage leadership, Azure DevOps/Jira tracking, regression management

skills.name: Agile leadership & delivery
skills.detail: Scrum Master (SAFE 4.6), Managing large test teams, stakeholder reporting, Hypercare/BAU coordination

experiences.summary: Led end-to-end core banking system upgrades and complex integrations using Azure DevOps and SQL, leading a team of seven testers while engineering comprehensive test plans and driving cross-team defect resolution.
highlights: Managed a team of 7 testers across three cross-functional teams, overseeing E2E testing, regression testing, and post-deployment verification.
Coordinated and executed program-wide E2E testing for Heartland Bank's core banking system upgrade to support production deployment.
Managed two concurrent testing projects, creating test plans, designing test cases, and establishing daily status reporting for stakeholders.
Acted as Subject Matter Expert (SME) for Distributed Energy Systems at Synergy, working with Salesforce and SAP IS-U integrations.
Managed defect workflows by leading daily stand-ups and triage meetings, using SQL for data validation, and setting up defect trackers in Azure DevOps and Monday.com
Assisted with onboarding by mentoring new testers, conducting technical system walkthroughs, and explaining system logic to business users.

experiences.role: Lead Quality Engineer | Senior Quality Engineer
experiences.summary: Directed multi-platform quality engineering processes and led technical training initiatives by designing and executing automated test frameworks across Web, Mobile, and APIs using C#.NET, Java, Selenium, Cucumber, and Appium.
highlights: Directed end-to-end testing and implemented Quality Engineering processes at project and program levels.
Developed test automation frameworks using Java, Cucumber, and Appium for a mobile banking application to increase test coverage.
Developed a C# Selenium automation framework for a web-based construction reporting tool alongside manual testing.
Coordinated QA tasks across US and Ukraine teams for a healthcare research system, focusing on requirement clarification and defect management.
Managed full-lifecycle test execution across Mobile, Web, API, and databases for an enterprise org-builder application.
Contributed to the Quality Engineering Group by creating training materials and upskilling engineers in JavaScript, SpecFlow, WebDriverJS, and Jest.

experiences.summary: Combined technical agility and agile leadership by acting as a Scrum Master for a code migration while setting up a Selenium C# test automation framework and performing cross-device mobile frontend/backend verification using Charles Proxy.
highlights: Tested mobile applications (Government, Health, Productivity) for an Australian client, validating frontend and backend functionality via Charles Proxy on iOS and Android.
Acted as Scrum Master for a Delphi to C# .NET migration project, facilitating sprint ceremonies and resolving cross-team dependencies.
Established a Selenium C# test automation framework to reduce regression cycles.
Authored Test Summary Reports and deployment checklists for scheduled production releases and hotfixes.

experiences.summary: Enhanced testing efficiency for desktop retail applications by developing custom Excel VBA/Macro codes for complex financial data validation and automating front-end regression test suites with HP QTP.
highlights: Developed Excel VBA/Macro tools to automate data validation against system CSV outputs, reducing testing cycle times.
Automated front-end regression testing suites using HP QTP.
Conducted User Acceptance Testing (UAT) and defect tracking for an enterprise HR scheduling desktop application.

experiences.summary: Demonstrated versatile analytical skills by acting as a Business Analyst to gather requirements and author Gherkin user stories, while executing cross-browser functional testing backed by MS SQL database validation.
highlights: Validated data migrations to .NET technologies for a Customer Service application using MS SQL queries and cross-browser testing.
Acted as a joint Business Analyst, gathering requirements and writing Gherkin-style user stories for an employee badge system.
Designed UI wireframes and mockups to refine the system user experience based on stakeholder feedback.

experiences.role: Senior Software Engineer | Associate Software Engineer
experiences.summary: Managed large-scale testing operations of up to 20 resources for a major eCommerce telecom platform, steering regression testing, web services validation, and complex data management using HP ALM.
highlights: Appointed as Regression Test Lead, managing 10-20 testers executing regression suites for a US telecommunications eCommerce site.
Shared duties as Secondary Release Lead, managing risk/mitigation planning, defect coordination, and status updates with US counterparts.
Supervised a Data Management Team of 6 resources maintaining test data across staging environments.
Executed functional UI and Web Service testing using HP ALM, and led teams of 2-5 testers on production support patches.
